content: Ti ẹrọ atẹle enthalpy igbẹkẹle n ka 47 kJ fun igbesoke pataki React kan, eyi tumọ si pe ipele imuduro kọọkan n gba agbara thermodynamic to ga. Lati dinku agbara imuduro fun igbesoke kọọkan, o dara lati ṣe awọn igbesoke pọ (batch upgrades) ki enthalpy lapapọ pin si awọn igbesoke diẹ sii, dinku agbara fun igbesoke kọọkan. Nitorinaa, o yẹ ki a ṣe awọn igbesoke pọ lati pin enthalpy naa dipo dinku ipele imuduro kọọkan.
